title: How Optimized
description: How Optimized is a modern optimization modpack that pushes Minecraft performance to the limit.
body:
How Optimized – Performance Modpack

How Optimized is a lightweight, modpack built for one goal:
⚡ the smoothest Minecraft experience possible.

Designed around the latest modern optimization technology, this pack focuses entirely on boosting FPS, reducing stutter, cutting loading times, and improving overall stability — all while keeping vanilla gameplay fully intact.

It’s actively maintained and updated to the latest Minecraft versions, ensuring long-term compatibility, fresh performance improvements, and the best possible experience on new updates.



✅ Features

✅ Latest optimization mods (Sodium, Lithium, ImmediatelyFast & more)

✅ Advanced rendering & culling optimizations for higher FPS and lower GPU load

✅ Better memory management & faster chunk loading

✅ Improved multiplayer performance & responsiveness

✅ Zero content or balance changes — pure optimization

✅ Regular updates to the newest Minecraft versions



🎯 Perfect For

Players who want maximum FPS with zero gameplay changes

Low-end PCs that need smoother performance

High-end PCs that want ultra-stable frame times

Players who always update to the latest Minecraft versions
